_description: Automation rules for Recovery's task system. Defines escalation policies, auto-routing, scheduled actions, and event-driven triggers. These rules are designed to be executed by the Bomba SR runtime scheduler or as event hooks on task_update.

escalation_rules._description: Automatic escalation when tasks stall or breach SLA thresholds.

rules.description: Escalate when a task exceeds the max_days defined for its current stage in workflow_stages.json.

params.message_template: ⚠️ SLA BREACH: Task '{task.title}' has been in '{task.stage}' for {days_in_stage} days (max: {stage.max_days}). Priority boosted to {new_priority}.

rules.description: Retention tasks with critical churn risk that aren't in 'intervention' within 24 hours get escalated to Recovery directly.
rules.condition: task_type == 'retention' AND metadata.churn_risk == 'critical' AND stage IN ['alert', 'diagnosis'] AND hours_in_current_stage > 24

params.message_template: 🚨 CRITICAL: Account '{metadata.account_name}' at critical churn risk — stalled at '{task.stage}' for {hours_in_stage}h. Needs immediate intervention.

rules.description: Agreements worth $100K+ that stall for more than 7 days in any active stage.
rules.condition: task_type == 'agreement' AND metadata.estimated_value >= 100000 AND days_in_current_stage > 7 AND stage NOT IN ['won', 'lost']

params.message_template: 💰 High-value deal '{task.title}' (${metadata.estimated_value}) stalled at '{task.stage}' for {days_in_stage} days. Review needed.

rules.description: If a task exceeds 2x its stage SLA, escalate beyond Recovery to SAI Prime for cross-sister attention.

params.message_template: 🔴 DOUBLE SLA BREACH: Recovery task '{task.title}' has been in '{task.stage}' for {days_in_stage} days (max: {stage.max_days}). Escalating to Prime for intervention.

auto_routing_rules._description: Automatically assign or reassign owner_agent_id based on task events.

rules.description: When a new task is created, assign to the being specified by being_routing.json for the task's initial stage.
When a task changes stage, check being_routing.json for the new stage's assigned_role and reassign if different.
Crisis PR tasks bypass normal routing and go directly to Recovery (the sister) for coordination.

scheduled_actions._description: Time-based automation that creates tasks, sends reminders, or triggers reviews.

rules.description: Auto-create retention task 90 days before any account/partnership renewal date.
Auto-create urgent retention task 30 days before renewal if no active retention task exists.
Every Monday at 8am, compile and post a pipeline summary to Recovery's dashboard.
Recalculate priority scores for all active tasks daily. Deadline proximity changes scores.
If an active account hasn't been contacted in 30+ days, create a retention check-in task.

params.title_template: Scheduled check-in: {account_name} (30+ days since last contact)

rules.description: 90 days after an agreement is marked 'lost', create a new identification task to re-engage.

event_hooks._description: Actions triggered by specific task field changes, not time-based.
